x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Field agent skills enable Now Assist FSM to match work orders to the most qualified agent.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Define field agent skills via wm_skill_list.do. Assign skills to all active field agents via wm_agent_skill. Target: 10+ skill definitions, 20+ agent skill assignments. Now Assist FSM uses skills data for AI-matched dispatch.
